in requitall or giuing of thankes. Which her 
Highnes perceiuing, motherly and with a naturall

countenance to two noble and goodly Nymphes, 
attending neere vnto her Royall and imperiall 
Throne, saying thus to one of them vpon her 
right side. 
Logistica, you shall bee one that shall 
accompanye our guest Poliphilus, and with a 
sacred and honourable grace, shee turned to the 
left hande saying, Thelemia, you shall also go 
with him. And both of you shewe and instruct him 
at what Gate hee must remayne, and then

The situation and place me thought was
